THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT VARGAS, BABY (AKA LUCY V. MOYA) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT REPOLLO, CHARITA B. SANDY, SAMA CROSS-COMPLAINANT MICHAEL SUBBA DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. - NO APPEARANCE. NEITHER PARTY WAS ABLE TO ESTABLISH HIS/HER CLAIM BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT VARGAS, BABY (AKA LUCY V. MOYA) TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT REPOLLO, CHARITA B. THE APPEAL IS FROM DEFT'S CLAIM FILED JULY 30, 2007. RESPONDENT'S TESTIMONY WAS INSUFFICIENT TO PROVE BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF HOURS ALLEGEDLY WORKED.
